strengths: ~17 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, meeting the minimum tenure requirement
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) shows current awareness of the AI tooling landscape
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, still active), plus early-stage startup experience at WatchUp where he stepped up across iOS, Apple TV, and backend
concerns: AI involvement is shallow and very recent (April 2025–present); no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms of strategic scale — the role requires recognized expertise with built products, not entry-level tooling contributions

No evidence of director-level responsibilities: no strategic customer advisory, no cross-organizational influence, no executive stakeholder engagement — the résumé reads as a senior/staff IC throughout
Education is a BS in Computer Science; the preferred qualification is a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and there is no compensating AI research or publication record
response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC who can advise strategic customers on cutting-edge AI and cloud adoption and partner with engineering leadership on AI platform strategy — essentially an externally-recognized AI thought leader with 15+ years of depth. Szabo's career demonstrates genuine breadth and craftsmanship (polyglot engineer, open-source founder, community educator), but his AI involvement only begins in 2025 and is limited to developer tooling at a single employer, with no shipped AI products, no ML/AI research, and no evidence of executive or strategic advisory work. His seniority has peaked at Staff Software Engineer, and there is no signal of the cross-organizational influence or customer-facing strategic leadership this principal-level role requires. The experience gap on the two highest-weight competencies — AI expertise and strategic leadership — makes him a poor fit at this level.
